name: [YAOC2 Skill] Publish — Bluesky
_doc: Sub-workflow skill. Called by the brain with enriched CTI content. Authenticates to Bluesky via ATP API, posts a thread or single post, returns post URI. Input: { text, tags[], thread_parent_uri? }. Output: { status, post_uri, result_summary }.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ repo: $json.did, collection: 'app.bsky.feed.post', record: { '$type': 'app.bsky.feed.post', text: $('Prepare Post Text').first().json.text, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), ...(($('Prepare Post Text').first().json.thread_parent_uri) ? { reply: { root: { uri: $('Prepare Post Text').first().json.thread_parent_uri, cid: '' }, parent: { uri: $('Prepare Post Text').first().json.thread_parent_uri, cid: '' } } } : {}) } }) }}
